---
title: "All the World's a Stage"
format: html
author: "Rayne Aurit"
date: "2026-01-31"
categories: [Art]
image: "AllTheWorldsAStage.jpg"
draft: yes
---

![](AllTheWorldsAStage.jpg)
*Digital art; Rayne Aurit, May, 2025*

In the 2025 spring semester, I took the course Intro to Queer Literature as a breadth requirement of the College of Engineering. As an openly queer person, it was so fun to enjoy literature and engage in discussions with other people interested in topics that I am.
